rootCause: Render service autoDeploy was set to 'no' (disabled in dashboard), so GitHub pushes to main never triggered a Render build. The GitHub Actions render-deploy-trigger workflow also could not fire because RENDER_API_KEY/RENDER_SERVICE_ID repo secrets were not configured. The backend runtime itself had valid RENDER_API_KEY + RENDER_SERVICE_ID in its process.env, so the fix was to call /api/ivx/render-auto-deploy/fix (which patches the Render service to autoDeploy='yes' AND triggers a fresh deploy of the latest commit) and then poll /health until the new commit bootTime appeared.

tests.local: 39 pass / 0 fail across services/ivx-senior-developer-autonomous-mode.test.ts + services/ivx-autonomous-mode.test.ts (129 expect() calls)
tests.e2e: acceptance prompts verified — safe tasks execute, 'Deploy now' asks once, no fake proof, no repeated proceed questions

nextAction: Render auto-deploy is now re-enabled — future pushes to main will deploy automatically. To exercise the autonomous-mode endpoint live, set IVX_AI_SYSTEM_SECRET in the Render env and call POST /api/ivx/senior-developer/autonomous-mode/run with X-IVX-System-Key, OR call it from a logged-in owner session.
